message:
fix(cloudflare): rewrite connector.rs to match V3 FcpConnector API, add manifest.toml

Rewrote connector to match actual FCP core types. 15 operations (zones, DNS,
Workers, Pages, KV), full V3 lifecycle, doctor diagnostics, 43 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -93,6 +93,24 @@ max_redirects = 0
 [provides.operations.dns_create_record.ai_hints]
 when_to_use = "When you need to add a DNS record to a domain"
 
+[provides.operations.dns_update_record]
+summary = "Update a DNS record"
+capability = "cloudflare.dns.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.dns_update_record.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.cloudflare.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.dns_update_record.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to modify an existing DNS record"
+
 [provides.operations.dns_delete_record]
 summary = "Delete a DNS record"
 capability = "cloudflare.dns.write"
@@ -129,6 +147,24 @@ max_redirects = 0
 [provides.operations.workers_list.ai_hints]
 when_to_use = "When you need to see deployed Workers scripts"
 
+[provides.operations.workers_get]
+summary = "Get a Workers script"
+capability = "cloudflare.workers.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.workers_get.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.cloudflare.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.workers_get.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need metadata for a specific Workers script"
+
 [provides.operations.workers_deploy]
 summary = "Deploy a Workers script"
 capability = "cloudflare.workers.write"
@@ -165,6 +201,42 @@ max_redirects = 0
 [provides.operations.workers_delete.ai_hints]
 when_to_use = "When you need to permanently remove a Workers script"
 
+[provides.operations.pages_list_projects]
+summary = "List Pages projects"
+capability = "cloudflare.pages.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.pages_list_projects.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.cloudflare.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.pages_list_projects.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to enumerate Cloudflare Pages projects"
+
+[provides.operations.pages_create_deployment]
+summary = "Create a Pages deployment"
+capability = "cloudflare.pages.write"
+risk = "high"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.pages_create_deployment.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.cloudflare.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.pages_create_deployment.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to trigger a Cloudflare Pages deployment"
+
 [provides.operations.kv_get]
 summary = "Get a KV value"
 capability = "cloudflare.kv.read"
